title: Initial and Follow-Up Interviews with Patients Participating in Work Ability Support Services in Primary Health Care 2021-2022
description: The dataset covers the experiences of primary health care clients of the work ability coordinator's work and functional ability support service in Finland. All interviewees participated in both the initial and follow-up interviews. The first interview took place immediately after the first visit to the work ability coordinator and the follow-up interview after the last visit. The time span was approximately six months. The number of visits to the work ability coordinator may have varied, but eac
